name: Cardinale RV Center
signals: Winnebago carries highest unit volume and is the marketing centerpiece (Winnebago is on Ekho's cap table)
High-ticket Class A motorhomes drive disproportionate gross
Coastal California buyer base; significant out-of-state titling friction
Service drives recurring revenue; RV service techs are scarce in the segment
Trade-in volume is the most underexploited inventory lever
aboutCopy: Cardinale RV is a family-owned dealership on California's Central Coast. We sell new and pre-owned motorhomes, travel trailers, and fifth wheels, and we have one of the largest service bays in the region.
